subcodes.first_line: O Shirin, O My handmaiden! Render praise unto Him Who is the Desire of the world, for He hath graciously granted thee a portion of the choice wine of utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا شیرین یا امتی حمد کن مقصود عالم را که ترا از رحیق بیان قسمت عنایت فرمود و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
